title: Madrid to Host the Global Gathering Redefining Government in the Digital Age [Promoted Content]
summary_full: The GovTech 4 Impact World Congress returns for its third edition this May, bringing together hundreds of government leaders, technologists, and policymakers from across the globe to tackle the defining governance challenges of our time.
